nodes.name: Webhook: Web Chat Intake
nodes.notes:
Receives chat messages from the SweetHandBraids widget.
Input: { session_id, customer_name, customer_phone, customer_email, message, message_type, style_id }

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.userContent } ], temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 500 }) }}

nodes.name: HTTP: Call OpenAI GPT-4o
nodes.notes: Calls OpenAI Chat Completions API directly. Uses $vars.OPENAI_API_KEY.
